issues.title: Roll-on applicator filter mismatch returns zero results
issues.prompt: 9ml cylinder with applicatorFilter Metal Roller,Plastic Roller
issues.expected: Roll-on cylinder variants should be returned
issues.actual: Legacy and canonical roll-on applicator filters now both return matching Cylinder results
issues.rootCause: Schema stores Metal Roller Ball and Plastic Roller Ball while Grace tool guidance still uses Metal Roller and Plastic Roller
issues.notes: Verified via direct convex runs for legacy and canonical applicatorFilter values, normalized family overview output, and askGrace conversational smoke test on 2026-03-06.

issues.title: Navbar voice-search posts to missing transcribe route
issues.prompt: User taps Search by voice in the navbar
issues.expected: Recorded audio should be transcribed into the search field
issues.actual: Navbar voice search now records audio, posts to /api/voice/transcribe, and receives transcription text through the new ElevenLabs-backed route
issues.rootCause: Client path drift between Navbar dictation flow and current app API routes
issues.notes: Verified on 2026-03-07 by posting a locally generated spoken audio sample to http://localhost:3000/api/voice/transcribe and receiving {"text":"Round bottles"}. Client flow also now surfaces transcription errors instead of failing silently.

issues.title: Grace can generate invalid PDP slug targets
issues.prompt: Show me cylinder or Boston Round product pages
issues.expected: Grace should navigate only to valid product group slugs or fallback to catalog pages
issues.actual: Grace now resolves fabricated PDP targets like /products/cylinder and /products/boston-round to safe catalog URLs or valid PDP slugs instead of sending users to broken pages
issues.rootCause: Navigation fallback logic did not preserve enough search context, and the regression audit was not exercising the same slug-recovery path used by the client
issues.notes: Verified on 2026-03-07 by updating the runtime slug fallback to preserve more of the original query intent, then running node scripts/grace-fixes/GI-0003-slug-safe-navigation.mjs. The refreshed navigation audit now passes 32/32 cases with all hallucination-style product slugs redirected safely.

issues.title: Grouped applicator values still use old roller terminology
issues.prompt: Get family overview for Royal or Square
issues.expected: Grouped applicator values should match canonical runtime vocabulary
issues.actual: Family overview now returns canonical applicator vocabulary, including Metal Roller Ball and Plastic Roller Ball, rather than the legacy roller terms
issues.rootCause: productGroups applicatorTypes were not rebuilt to match the current schema vocabulary
issues.notes: Verified on 2026-03-07 by querying api.grace.getFamilyOverview for Royal and confirming applicatorTypes returned Fine Mist Sprayer, Metal Roller Ball, and Plastic Roller Ball after recent group rebuilds.

issues.title: products:auditDataQuality exceeds Convex read limit
issues.expected: The data quality audit should complete on the current dataset
issues.actual: The paginated data quality audit now completes successfully on the full 2318-product dataset and returns a stable issue summary instead of failing
issues.rootCause: The audit previously collected the entire products table in one query instead of paging through the dataset with bounded reads
issues.notes: Verified on 2026-03-07 by converting products:auditDataQuality into a paginated action backed by internal.migrations.getProductPage, then running node scripts/grace-fixes/GI-0005-paginate-data-quality-audit.mjs and node scripts/data_quality_audit.mjs successfully against the full dataset.

issues.title: Bottle components disagree with fitment matrix for 18-415 Circle reducer bottle
issues.prompt: What fits this bottle? / parity check for GB-CIR-FRS-100ML-RDC-WHT
issues.expected: Grouped bottle components and thread-size fitment matrix should agree on which component types fit the bottle
issues.actual: Grace and the PDP fitment drawer now suppress Dropper for GB-CIR-FRS-100ML-RDC-WHT, matching the 18-415 Circle 100ml Frosted fitment rule
issues.rootCause: Runtime bottle-component queries trusted stale embedded product components without reconciling them against the bottle-specific fitment rule
issues.notes: Verified on 2026-03-07 after reconciling bottle-component queries against the matched fitment rule by thread/family/capacity/frosted state, then running node scripts/grace-fixes/GI-0006-fitment-parity-18-415-circle-reducer.mjs. Live queries now show no Dropper for GB-CIR-FRS-100ML-RDC-WHT in either grace:getBottleComponents or products:getCompatibleFitments.

issues.title: Diva 46ml dropper colors drift from website source of truth
issues.prompt: Batch 2 Browserless diff for Circle, Sleek, Round, Diva, Slim families
issues.expected: Convex product colors should match the live Best Bottles website for every SKU in the cohort
issues.actual: GBDiva46DrpCu and GBDiva46DrpGl now match the live Best Bottles website as Clear in Convex after the targeted color patch and group rebuild
issues.rootCause: Two Diva 46ml dropper records retain stale color assignments despite the live SKU pages and item copy indicating clear glass
issues.notes: Verified on 2026-03-07 by running scripts/grace-fixes/GI-0007-diva-46ml-dropper-color-parity.mjs, exporting a fresh Convex snapshot, and re-running the repaired Batch 2 diff. Final Batch 2 summary: 877 live, 877 Convex, 0 missing, 0 color mismatches, 0 capacity mismatches.
